root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, ((CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no WHEN null THEN '' ELSE 'เลขที่ '||sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.moo WHEN null THEN '' ELSE 'หมู่ '||sc_mem_m_member_address.moo END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.road WHEN null THEN '' ELSE ' ถ.'||sc_mem_m_member_address.road END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.soi WHEN null THEN '' ELSE ' ซ.'||sc_mem_m_member_address.soi END) ) as address1, ((CASE sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol WHEN null THEN '' ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code WHEN '10' THEN 'แขวง' ELSE 'ต.' END)||sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name WHEN null THEN '' ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code WHEN '10' THEN ' เขต' ELSE ' อ.' END)||sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name END) ||(CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name WHEN null THEN '' ELSE (CASE sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code WHEN '10' THEN ' ' ELSE ' จ.' END)||sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name END) ) as address2, ( 'รหัส. '||sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode ) as address3 from sc_mem_m_member_address, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_province, sc_mem_m_ucf_district where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_district.province_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_member_retire(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) = ( select end_date + interval '1 day' from sc_lon_m_close_year where lon_year = '!lon_year_1!' ) and ( sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ -- and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '013491' ) order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
